title: Reinforced Elytra
description: Combine elytras and chestplates to deliver an unparalleled Minecraft experience.
body:
### Please let me know if you can't use firework rockets. It's a known bug for some users 
```soldship``` on discord


- **Crafting Flexibility**: Seamlessly combine your elytra with various chestplates (excluding leather) to enhance exploration capabilities without sacrificing armor protection. Recipes support Chainmail, Iron, Gold, Diamond, and Netherite chestplates.
  
- **Optimized Features**: Each combined chestplate retains its original armor value and durability plus the durability of an elytra, ensuring effective protection during combat. Enhanced with gliding functionality, this pack allows for uninterrupted exploration and mobility across biomes and terrain.

- **Special Attributes**: Each item is fully equippable, swappable, and compatible with dispensers, allowing for convenient accessibility.
